description: Evaluate the annual energy savings of upgrading all windows in a residential building to high-efficiency glazing. 1. Open the existing project '~/Documents/Energy3D/building-passive-heating.ng3'. 2. Run an Annual Energy Analysis (Analysis menu > Buildings > Annual Energy Analysis) and record the baseline total energy (Heating + Cooling). 3. Modify the properties of ALL windows in the building to simulate high-efficiency Low-E glazing: set the U-Value to 1.2 and the Solar Heat Gain Coefficient (SHGC) to 0.3. 4. Run the Annual Energy Analysis again with the upgraded windows. 5. Take a screenshot of the completed analysis dialog showing the new results and save it exactly as '~/Documents/Energy3D/upgraded_analysis.png'. 6. Calculate the energy savings and create a report at '~/Documents/Energy3D/retrofit_report.txt' formatted exactly with three lines: 'Baseline Total Energy: [Value] kWh', 'Upgraded Total Energy: [Value] kWh', and 'Total Savings: [Value] kWh'. 7. Save the modified building model as '~/Documents/Energy3D/window_retrofit.ng3'.
